meta.target_definition: Walk 1H candles forward through the call day. Bullish rows win when a later candle high reaches the prior lowest low plus required L2L distance. Bearish rows win when a later candle low reaches the prior highest high minus required L2L distance.
meta.reference_price_policy: Required L2L distance is dynamic 50% ADR20 from daily candles. Fixed legacy L2L values are preserved as diagnostics only.

source_audit.blocker: USD remains unavailable because no supportable repo-local DXY daily plus 1H source is staged.

entry_reliability_groups.description: Includes BULLISH, BEARISH, BULLISH_LEAN, and BEARISH_LEAN.
